title: Maebashi,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Maebashi, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Maebashi is a city in with a population of 340,000. The capital of Gunma with famous hot springs nearby, scenic mountains, and some of Japan’s most affordable housing.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
